<!--
Thanks for contributing to the UK DVS trust framework data schema workspace.
Please fill in as much of this template as applies to your change.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Nature of change

Tick the box(es) that apply. This tells reviewers whether the change is to
the workspace tooling or to the published text it hosts.

- [ ] `[repo]` — repository structure, navigation, READMEs, CI, templates,
      supporting material, site build, or other non-publication change.
- [ ] `[publication]` — change to the text of a published data schema
      version. If ticked, this PR must cite the upstream GOV.UK publication
      and the reason (typo correction, editorial fix, formal revision).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have preserved the caution block at the top of every workspace
      Markdown file touched by this PR.
- [ ] I have updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) under the right
      heading (`[repo]` or `[publication]`).
- [ ] If I added a new page, I have added a navigation footer.
- [ ] If I added derived supporting material, I have clearly labelled it as
      derived and non-authoritative.
- [ ] I have not changed the underlying data model, definitions, field
      names, hierarchy, cardinality, or semantic meaning of any schema
      element.
